title: NIIMBL bioLOGIC ™
description: A learning program developed by NIIMBL with a student-led, design-thinking approach related to a real-world advanced manufacturing challenge.
text:
NIIMBL bioLOGIC is a project-based learning program developed by NIIMBL that focuses on three pillars:
Engagement with advanced technologies
Familiarization with the principles of entrepreneurship
Exposure to education and career pathways that lead into the advanced manufacturing sector
